parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ size: ($json.size || 15), sort: [{ timestamp: { order: 'desc' } }], _source: ['id','timestamp','rule.id','rule.level','rule.description','rule.groups','agent.name','data.srcip','data.srcuser','full_log','syscheck.path','syscheck.sha256_after','syscheck.sha1_after','syscheck.md5_after','data.virustotal'], query: { query_string: { query: '(' + ($json.q || '*:*') + ') AND NOT (rule.id:100100 OR rule.groups:ai_enrichment OR data.integration:deepseek)', default_operator: 'AND' } } }) }}
